chunks.title: Call to Remember Creator in Youth
chunks.reason: A unified poetic exhortation urging remembrance of God before physical decline and death occur.

chunks.title: The Preacher's Reflection on Wisdom
chunks.reason: A concluding argument summarizing the vanity of life and the value of wise instruction.

chunks.title: Final Summary and Judgment
chunks.reason: The ultimate conclusion commanding fear of God and keeping His commandments with the promise of judgment.
